title: Paranda Fort
tagline: Paranda Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Paranda Fort is situated in Paranda, a small town in the Osmanabad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Paranda Fort is situated in Paranda, a small town in the Osmanabad district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is protected monument by the Archaeological Survey Of India. The fort may have been constructed in the 15th century by Mahmud Gawan or by Murtaza Nizam Shah II in the early 1600s. Paranda has great historical value and finde mention in Honnati inscription of Baka 1045 (A.D. 1924) and also later a few of the Kalyan Chalukyan an copper plates.

topPlaces.name: Paranda
topPlaces.description: Paranda is a town with a municipal council in the Dharashiv district of the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is the headquarters town for the Paranda Tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Khasapur Dam
topPlaces.description: Khasapuri Dam, is an earthfill dam on local river near Paranda, Osmanabad district in State of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Sina Kolegaon Dam
topPlaces.description: Sina Kolegaon Dam is a dam on Sina river near Paranda, Dharashiv District in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Chandani Dam
topPlaces.description: Chandani Dam, is an earthfill dam on Chandani river near Paranda, Osmanabad district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Paranda Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Paranda Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Paranda Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (165 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Paranda Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Paranda Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Paranda Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Paranda Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Paranda Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paranda, Khasapur Dam, Sina Kolegaon Dam, Chandani Dam.
